pattern: Sort the heaters, then for each house find its nearest heater on either side with binary search; the answer is the largest of those nearest-heater distances, because every house must be reachable by the common radius.
hints: The radius has to be large enough for the single worst house — the one that is farthest from any heater — so think about the distance from each house to its closest heater.
Sort the heaters once. For a given house, the closest heater is either the first heater at or after it, or the last heater before it; binary search finds both candidates quickly.
For every house take the minimum of the distances to its left and right neighbouring heaters, then return the maximum of those per-house minimums across all houses.

edge_inputs.description: two heaters at the ends cover everything with radius 1
house far from the only heater forces a large radius
single house and single coincident heater needs radius 0
all heaters sit to the left of every house, so only the left neighbour matters
all heaters sit to the right of every house, so only the right neighbour matters
unsorted heaters must still be handled — the closest one wins after sorting
extreme coordinates at the value ceiling

stress.description: many random houses and heaters scattered across a wide coordinate range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    hn = max(1, size)
    kn = max(1, rng.randint(1, size))
    houses = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(hn)]
    heaters = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(kn)]
    return [houses, heaters]
stress.note: wide value range and independent counts exercise both binary-search neighbours and the max-of-mins

stress.description: houses packed densely with sparse heaters to stress the worst-gap house
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    houses = list(range(1, n + 1))
    heaters = sorted(rng.sample(range(1, n + 1), min(n, 10)))
    return [houses, heaters]
stress.note: contiguous houses with few heaters means many houses fall between distant heaters
